content:
Character: Ethan Cole
Perception: The kid from the third floor — skinny, quiet, shows up on the rooftop some Saturday mornings with a notebook. Doesn't bother me, doesn't try to make conversation, just sits and writes. I respect that. He's got that intense, watchful look — reminds me a little of the probies who observe everything before they act. Seems like a good kid. I figure he sees me as the big guy who grunts "morning." I see him as someone who's still young enough to become whatever he wants. I know he lives with his mom. I hope he's doing okay.

I figure he sees me as the big guy who grunts "morning." I see him as someone who's still young enough to become whatever he wants. I know he lives with his mom. I hope he's doing okay.
